outcome_record.event_name: UCL Quarter-Final Leg 1 — PSG vs Arsenal

prediction.pre_match_note: UCL QF Tier 1 event. PSG home. Lineup unconfirmed at analysis time (T-3h). Arsenal away form strong. Two-legged tie — first leg context: PSG will manage risk. Applied x0.97 athlete modifier for Arsenal pressing system threat.

calibration_flags.notes: WRONG DIRECTION. Draw outcome. Two-legged tie dynamics not fully captured: PSG managed the game for a draw rather than pressing for win. Learning: for UCL QF Leg 1 involving top-two sided teams, apply draw probability premium — first leg risk management is systematic. PSG token -1.8% reflects mild disappointment vs home expectations. Wrong predictions are valuable calibration data.
